\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
Abstract base class for SIE formulations. 

Derived classes (e.\+g., PMCHWT) implement the routines that assemble the system matrix and right-\/hand side using the provided RWG basis, Green\textquotesingle{}s function back-\/end, and a list of incident fields. 

Definition at line \mbox{\hyperlink{SIEForm_8h_source_l00031}{31}} of file \mbox{\hyperlink{SIEForm_8h_source}{SIEForm.\+h}}.

Construct the SIE formulation context. 

Stores pointers to basis functions, Green\textquotesingle{}s function back-\/end, and incident fields. Computes the angular frequency from the given vacuum wavelength.


\begin{DoxyParams}{Parameters}
{\em in\+RWGFuns} & RWG basis function array (owned elsewhere). \\
\hline
{\em in\+Grn\+Fun} & Green\textquotesingle{}s function object (owned elsewhere). \\
\hline
{\em in\+Inc\+Fields} & List of incident fields (owned elsewhere). \\
\hline
{\em in\+Vac\+Wavelength} & Vacuum wavelength used to compute omega. \\
\hline
\end{DoxyParams}

virtual int SIEForm\+::\+Fill\+LSEMatrix (\begin{DoxyParamCaption}\item[{blitz\+::\+Array$<$ \mbox{\hyperlink{globals_8h_a52196b4b274b585226e0614490f7defc}{dcmplx}}, 2 $>$ \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}}]{matrix}{}\end{DoxyParamCaption})\hspace{0.3cm}{\ttfamily [pure virtual]}}



Assemble the system matrix $ \mathbf{A} $. 

Populates the complex matrix used in the linear system $ \mathbf{A}\mathbf{x}=\mathbf{b} $. Derived classes must resize/fill {\ttfamily matrix} entirely.


\begin{DoxyParams}{Parameters}
{\em matrix} & Output pointer to a 2D Blitz array to be filled. \\
\hline
\end{DoxyParams}
\begin{DoxyReturn}{Returns}
0 on success; non-\/zero on error. 
\end{DoxyReturn}


Implemented in \mbox{\hyperlink{classSIEFormPMCHW_a65dca87d3c16fbf2c82200d597e18417}{SIEForm\+PMCHW}}.

\Hypertarget{classSIEForm_ac9e576744fb7aa010cf20a0e9a95b056}\index{SIEForm@{SIEForm}!FillLSEMatrixAndGradient@{FillLSEMatrixAndGradient}}

\doxysubsubsection{\texorpdfstring{FillLSEMatrixAndGradient()}{FillLSEMatrixAndGradient()}}
{\footnotesize\ttfamily \label{classSIEForm_ac9e576744fb7aa010cf20a0e9a95b056} 
virtual int SIEForm\+::\+Fill\+LSEMatrix\+And\+Gradient (\begin{DoxyParamCaption}\item[{blitz\+::\+Array$<$ \mbox{\hyperlink{globals_8h_a52196b4b274b585226e0614490f7defc}{dcmplx}}, 2 $>$ \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}}]{matrix}{, }\item[{blitz\+::\+Array$<$ \mbox{\hyperlink{globals_8h_a52196b4b274b585226e0614490f7defc}{dcmplx}}, 2 $>$ \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}}]{gradmatrix}{\mbox{[}3\mbox{]}}\end{DoxyParamCaption})\hspace{0.3cm}{\ttfamily [pure virtual]}}



Assemble system matrix and its gradient w.\+r.\+t. 

geometry parameters.

Some inverse/design workflows require gradients of the operator with respect to three geometry parameters (e.\+g., dx, dy, dz). Derived classes must fill {\ttfamily matrix} and the three gradient matrices in {\ttfamily gradmatrix}.


\begin{DoxyParams}{Parameters}
{\em matrix} & Output system matrix. \\
\hline
{\em gradmatrix} & Array of three pointers to gradient matrices $(\partial Z / \partial p_i)$. \\
\hline
\end{DoxyParams}
\begin{DoxyReturn}{Returns}
0 on success; non-\/zero on error. 
\end{DoxyReturn}


Implemented in \mbox{\hyperlink{classSIEFormPMCHW_a6b8755f234cd116ae3f3a44cacf85813}{SIEForm\+PMCHW}}.

Assemble the right-\/hand side vector $ \mathbf{b} $. 

Uses the incident fields and testing with the RWG basis to construct the excitation vector compatible with the chosen formulation.

\hline
\end{DoxyParams}
